transliterations.transliteration: Tsiok Hok jîn/bí tshiâng Tshun bān Liân
zuk1 fuk1 jan4 soeng4 ceon1 maan6 nin4
zhù fú rén cháng chūn wàn nián

trans.div: Wish you eternal spring and eternal spring

text.transcription: 民國五十七年八月二日置

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok Ngóo tsa̍p tshit liân pat Gua̍t Jī Ji̍t tì
man4 gwok3 ng5 sap6 cat1 nin4 baat3 jyut6 ji6 jat6 zi3
mínguó wǔ shí qī nián bā yuè èr rì zhì

trans.div: Settled on August 2nd, 507th year of the Republic of China
